examples: Why not try the beef potpie? That's the special today.
To our great amusement she had a large potpie in her box.
Lots of people come in on Mondays just to get our beef potpie. Or how about the oyster stew?
If you did not look too closely, this mofongo relleno could have passed as a chicken potpie, with the cassava masquerading as pastry crust.
